title: ngrok Reserved Domain
description: A Reserved Domain is a custom hostname reserved for use with HTTP, HTTPS, or TLS tunnels and edges.

id.description: Unique identifier for the reserved domain.

uri.description: URI of the reserved domain API resource.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the reserved domain was created.

domain.description: The hostname of the reserved domain.

region.description: The ngrok region where the domain is reserved.

cname_target.description: The DNS CNAME target for custom domains.

certificate.description: Reference to the TLS certificate for the domain.

certificate_management_policy.description: The certificate management policy for automated TLS certificates.

certificate_management_status.description: The status of the certificate management process.

acme_challenge_cname_target.description: The CNAME target for ACME certificate validation challenges.
